CVE-2025-62820.title: Slack Nebula before 1.9.7 mishandles CIDR in some configurations  ...
CVE-2025-62820.description: Slack Nebula before 1.9.7 mishandles CIDR in some configurations and thus accepts arbitrary source IP addresses within the Nebula network.

CVE-2026-25793.title: Nebula is a scalable overlay networking tool. In versions from 1. ...
CVE-2026-25793.description: Nebula is a scalable overlay networking tool. In versions from 1.7.0 to 1.10.2, when using P256 certificates (which is not the default configuration), it is possible to evade a blocklist entry created against the fingerprint of a certificate by using ECDSA Signature Malleability to use a copy of the certificate with a different fingerprint. This issue has been patched in version 1.10.3.
